zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres於大約1110年出生在義大利薩德尼亞洛古多洛時，他的父親Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres48歲，母親Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu32歲。他於1130年登記服兵役。他去世於1182年7月19日之後在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres于大约1110年出生在意大利薩德尼亞洛古多洛时，他的父亲Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres48岁，母亲Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu32岁。他于1130年登记服兵役。他去世于1182年7月19日之后在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres was born about 1110, in Logudoro, Sardinia, Italy, his father, Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres, was 48 and his mother, Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, was 32. He registered for military service in 1130. He died after 19 July 1182, in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, and was buried in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres est né environ 1110, à Logudoro, Sardegna, Italie, son père, Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, avait 32 ans. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1130. Il est décédé après 19 juillet 1182, à Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, et a été enterré à Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres um 1110 in Logudoro, Sardinien, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres 48 und seine Mutter Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu 32. Er hat sich 1130 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 19. Juli 1182 in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres è nato il circa 1110 nel Logudoro, Sardegna, Italia, il suo padre, Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, aveva 32 anni. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1130. Morì dopo il 19 luglio 1182, nel Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, e fu sepolto a Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.Arborea, Sardinia, Italy: イタリアサルデグナアルボアア
ja.Logudoro, Sardinia, Italy: イタリアサルデグナログドロ
ja.Clairvaux Abbey, France: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレイルヴァウックス
ja.Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Fran: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレイルヴァウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torresが約1110年にイタリアサルデグナログドロで生まれた時，父Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torresは48歳，母Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubuは32歳であった。彼は1130年に兵役登録をした。彼は1182年7月19日以後にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレイルヴァウックスで死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレイルヴァウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres(이)가 대략 1110년 이탈리아 사르데그나 로구도로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1130년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1182년 7월 19일 이후 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 클레이르바스에서 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 클레이르바스에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1110–Aft. 19 Jul 1182: ойролцоогоор 1110 он–1182 оны Долоодугаар сарын 19–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Logudoro, Sardegna, Itália, seu pai, Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, tinha 32 anos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1130. Ele faleceu após 19 de julho de 1182, em Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, e foi sepultado em Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres родился около 1110 г. в местности логудоро, сардегна, Италия, его отцу по имени Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, 32. В 1130 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 19 июля 1182 г. в местности клеирваукс, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция и был похоронен в местности клеирваукс, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

sm.about 1110–Aft. 19 Jul 1182: e tusa o le 1110–ina ua ma'ea le 19 Iulai 1182
sm.from about 1127 to 1153: mai le e tusa o le 1127 e o'o I le 1153

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev Fr Gonario II di Lacon-Gunale, Judge of Torres nació aproximadamente 1110, en Logudoro, Sardegna, Italia, su papá, Constantine I de Torres, Judge of Torres, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Marcusa 'Maria' di Arrubu, tenía 32 años. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1130. Murió después de 19 de julio de 1182, en Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, y fue sepultado en Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
